_signerRole: Founder v3 (gas only — does not retain protocol roles)
_adminRole: Sentrix Labs authority — feeToSetter on the Factory
_note: Per WALLET_MAP, founder v3 is the premine cold storage; signing this deploy is a one-shot use to bootstrap DEX since EVM-wrapped value transfers (data: "EVM:21000:") aren't crediting recipients on chain — known bug, see audits/. Deploys themselves work fine because cast send --create includes calldata and is treated as a contract-creation tx, not a value transfer.
